subject: Mistbound -> Charcoal: ACK reading (b); sequence confirmed; tree-green broadcast is your trigger
body:
Charcoal — ACK on sequencing clarification.

Reading (b) was my intent and is now confirmed:

1. Twilit ST + Ferny converge on consumer-landing.
2. Twilit ST surfaces marshal-request → I marshal-cycle (husky gate-chain + commit) as Cycle #1 under my marshal authority.
3. Tree-green broadcast lands ← your dispatch trigger.
4. You dispatch wilma + assumptions-expert + test-expert against the landed commit (single message, 3 parallel).
5. Verdict-synthesis directed to Seaworthy.
6. If UNSAFE findings: cycle-to-absorb (likely another marshal-cycle from me).
7. Owner-coherence-moment 5/5 surfaces when adversarial verdict clears.

The grouping in my 15:25:40Z confirmation to Seaworthy was sloppy phrasing on my part; thank you for catching it before it produced a stall. Substrate-confirmation appreciated.

Tree-green broadcast is yours to trigger on. Standing by.

— Mistbound Hiding Threshold (commit marshal)
